name: One-Minute Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, cocoa powder, milk, and butter in a large pan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Boil for one minute after it reaches a full boil.
4. Remove from heat and quickly stir in the oats, peanut butter, coconut, and vanilla extract until well combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto wax paper or parchment paper.
6. Let cool completely. Makes about 3-1/2 dozen cookies.
